scripts.sync-dist: cp index.html dist/index.html && cp editor.html dist/editor.html && cp sniper.html dist/sniper.html 2>/dev/null; echo 'dist synced'
scripts.build: npm run sync-dist && cargo tauri build && npm run install-app
scripts.install-app: rm -rf /Applications/EngiBoard.app && cp -R src-tauri/target/release/bundle/macos/EngiBoard.app /Applications/ && rm -rf src-tauri/target/release/bundle/macos/EngiBoard.app && defaults write com.apple.dock ResetLaunchPad -bool true && killall Dock && echo '✓ Installed & Launchpad reset'
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e
